overall.description: A static nighttime scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a group of characters gathered around a bonfire on a rooftop, with the distinctive Arasaka towers and Night City skyline visible in the background. The fire illuminates the group while cool blue city lights contrast against the warm flames.

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on a rooftop overlooking Night City, where a group of characters gather around a large bonfire. The Arasaka towers rise in the distant background with their signature blue lighting, while the fire casts warm orange light on the surrounding characters seated on folding chairs and crates. A palm tree stands to the left, silhouetted against the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a nighttime rooftop gathering that contrasts intimate warmth against a cold, futuristic skyline. It begins with a wide view of characters huddled around a large bonfire, where the flickering orange light illuminates those seated on folding chairs and crates. As the eye wanders, the warmth of the fire blends into the deep shadows of a silhouetted palm tree standing to the left. The scene then expands toward the horizon, shifting focus to the distant Arasaka towers that pierce the dark sky with their signature blue lighting. Finally, the composition settles into a balance between the glowing embers of the rooftop camp and the sprawling, neon-lit expanse of Night City.
